overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Unity showing the protagonist walking through the Palais des Tuileries gardens during the French Revolution era. The scene transitions from a formal garden approach to the palace side, featuring period-dressed NPCs, classical French architecture, and revolutionary barricades scattered throughout.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the central garden path toward the palace entrance

notable_agents.action: man in brown coat and tricorn hat walking toward the camera
woman in green dress with white apron walking alongside the path

entered.detail: large classical stone palace with symmetrical facade and central dome
black cast iron street lamp with multiple lanterns
large stone planter with manicured spherical bush
tall rectangular trimmed hedge rows lining the walkway
broken wooden planks and red cloth scattered on the stone path

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a wide formal garden path toward the Palais des Tuileries. Ornate lampposts and large topiary urns line the walkway, while NPCs in 18th-century attire walk in opposing directions. The palace facade dominates the center background, and revolutionary debris is scattered across the stone pavement.

events.description: character turns right off the main garden path toward the palace side
moving from formal garden to barricaded palace side area with cannons

agents.ego_description: turning right and moving along the palace side, passing by revolutionary cannons and wooden barricades

notable_agents.action: group of revolutionaries gathered near the wooden barricade

entered.detail: large black iron cannon with wooden wheels positioned on the grass
makeshift barrier constructed from wooden planks and crates
stacks of burlap sandbags piled near the barricade
patch of grass between the paved path and the barricades

segments.scene_description: The character turns right from the main path and moves onto a grassy area beside the palace. Revolutionary-era cannons and wooden barricades with sandbags occupy the right side, while the palace facade shifts to the left. The ground transitions from stone pavement to grass as the character explores the barricaded forecourt.

scene_state.functional_zone: palace side alley with debris and side entrance

events.description: moving into the shadow cast by the palace building, light becomes diffused

agents.ego_description: walking along the palace wall examining the architecture and approaching a side entrance doorway

entered.detail: detailed stone facade with tall arched windows and classical columns
large wooden doorway with stone architrave leading into the palace
stacked wooden boxes and barrels near the wall
piles of broken stone and construction debris

segments.scene_description: The character moves along the side of the palace into a narrower enclosed space with the building wall on the left. The lighting shifts to diffused shadow as the character approaches a side entrance doorway. Wooden crates and stone rubble line the path, and the ornate architectural details of the palace wall become prominent up close.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a wide, formal garden approach into the shadowed, enclosed side corridors of the Palais des Tuileries. It begins on a broad stone walkway lined with ornate lampposts and topiary urns, moving past 18th-century pedestrians toward the imposing palace facade. As the character turns right, the scene shifts from the open pavement to a grassy forecourt where the palace recedes to the left and revolutionary cannons and sandbagged barricades emerge on the right. The camera then follows the character into a narrower space, where the open light fades into diffused shadow against the towering palace wall. Finally, the path tightens among wooden crates and stone rubble as the movement leads directly toward a side entrance doorway.
